summary: Completed testing of B2B Plywood/Timber ordering system iteration 10. Fixed missing PUT endpoint for Admin Products V2 edit functionality. Verified Sales Portal and Customer Portal status filters are correct after copying updated builds.
critical_code_review_comments: The sales-portal and customer-portal builds were not being copied to /app/frontend/dist/ and /app/frontend/public/ directories. This caused stale UI to be served. Ensure builds are copied after any changes.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added PUT /api/admin/products-v2/{product_id} endpoint for editing products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: 1) Admin Products V2 edit modal shows 'Edit Product' title and 'Save Changes' button, 2) Sales Portal Orders has correct status filters (All, Pending, Approved, Delivered, Cancelled), 3) Customer Portal Orders has correct status filters (All, Pending, Approved, Delivered, Cancelled), 4) Backend /api/sales/orders and /api/sales/invoices endpoints working correctly. IMPORTANT: When making changes to sales-portal or customer-portal, remember to copy builds to /app/frontend/dist/ and /app/frontend/public/ directories.

admin_products_v2_edit.details: Click product card opens modal with 'Edit Product' title, 'Save Changes' button present, product data populated correctly

sales_portal_orders_filters.details: Status filters are: All, Pending, Approved, Delivered, Cancelled (no 'Completed' or 'Order Placed')

sales_portal_invoices_api.details: /api/sales/invoices endpoint working, returns invoices for assigned customers

customer_portal_orders_filters.details: Status filters are: All, Pending, Approved, Delivered, Cancelled (no 'Order Placed')

fixes_applied.fix: Added PUT endpoint in server.py to update products with variants and tier pricing

fixes_applied.issue: Sales Portal showing old status filters (Created, Dispatched, Invoiced, Completed)
fixes_applied.fix: Copied updated sales-portal build to /app/frontend/dist/sales/ and /app/frontend/public/sales/

fixes_applied.issue: Customer Portal showing 'Order Placed' instead of 'Pending'
fixes_applied.fix: Copied updated customer-portal build to /app/frontend/dist/portal/ and /app/frontend/public/portal/
